title: After Action Report: Missed Drop Kick Live Ball Returns
scope: Engine mechanic — missed drop kick live ball return system. Implement a live ball return mechanic for missed DKs at long range.

rationale.item: Previously, ALL missed DKs on downs 1-5 were dead balls with zero consequence (Finnish baseball rule: retain possession, advance down). This made long-range DK attempts completely risk-free.
Teams could bomb 65-yard DKs with impunity knowing at worst they'd retain possession.

actions.description: Live ball rate table (distance-dependent, 0% at ≤45yd to 55% at 65+yd), return mechanics using _pick_returner() and _calculate_punt_return_yards()
Two new PlayResult enum values: MISSED_DK_RETURNED, MISSED_DK_RETURN_TD
Integration into drive loop, composure system, possession/kickoff handling, stall handling, scoring
Stats tracking under existing kick return stat fields (game_kick_returns, game_kick_return_yards, game_kick_return_tds)

validation_claims.claim: 20-game batch: 55 total DK misses, 14 live ball returns (25.5%), 2 return TDs (3.6%), 39 retained (70.9%). By distance: 25-49yd 0 live/15 retained, 50-54yd 1/3, 55-59yd 2/2, 60-64yd 3/7, 65-69yd 6/5, 70+yd 2/8.
validation_claims.check_method: Run 20-game batch sim and tabulate DK miss outcomes by distance bucket

validation_claims.claim: All 20 test games completed without errors or state corruption.
validation_claims.check_method: Run 20-game batch sim and check for exceptions

open_hooks: A team with a 93-speed backup Keeper on return duty has an 8% TD rate on fielded missed DKs
section_headers_original: After Action Report: Missed Drop Kick Live Ball Returns
unmapped_content: Files Modified: engine/game_engine.py, replit.md. Live ball check positioned BEFORE Finnish baseball retain-possession rule in simulate_drop_kick() so it applies on ALL downs. Field position orientation validated against existing punt return system to prevent inverted yard lines. Return TD chance by speed: base 4%, speed≥85 6%, speed≥92 8%.
parser_notes: Date: February 23, 2026 — confirmed in document header. No explicit non_actions or residual risk sections.
